meaning: vt.指定,详细说明,列入清单
examples: For the effect, you need to specify a size, with the horizontal size first, and then the vertical size.
It's got to be practical so don't forget to specify things like who would be involved, and the cost, and the order that things would be done in.
The trick is not only to specify just one or even two dimensions of the objective, but also to understand how to help people better achieve the objective.
The rules also specify that students should refrain from wearing a "full or half veil".
Villasenor did not specify what the FBI K-9 dogs hit on, or the possible significance.
